items.title: Ethiopia PM's party wins landslide as fears grow of new conflict
items.dek: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.
items.body: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US and Iran begin talks on initial peace deal in Switzerland
items.dek: The face-to-face meeting follows ongoing fighting in Lebanon and Iran's claim to have shut the Strait of Hormuz.
items.body: The face-to-face meeting follows ongoing fighting in Lebanon and Iran's claim to have shut the Strait of Hormuz.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: An ancient oak tree said to have sheltered legendary Robin Hood has died
